query:
-- Remove remaining duplicates (keep the one with the lowest id to preserve references)
DELETE wc1 FROM wa_conversations wc1
INNER JOIN wa_conversations wc2
ON wc1.remoteJid = wc2.remoteJid 
AND wc1.sessionId = wc2.sessionId
AND wc1.tenantId = wc2.tenantId
AND wc1.id > wc2.id;
command:
